summary: The diff modifies AboutUs.tsx, WhyChooseUs.tsx, and related metadata files to remove BIS Hallmarked and Certified Purity mentions. The changes appear to cover the About Us section (stat highlights) and the WhyChooseUs section (feature descriptions). The Products.tsx file is not shown as modified but its file summary suggests no BIS/certified purity language remains. The implementation appears largely complete for REQ-5.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove all mentions from the Products section descriptions and feature highlights
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/components/Products.tsx is not listed as a modified file in the diff. No diff evidence shows it was changed. The file summary for Products.tsx does not explicitly confirm removal of BIS hallmark or certified purity language, and the file itself was not modified according to the diff.
